backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the portfolio backend with CRUD operations for user profiles, testimonials, blog posts, projects, services, skills, leads, and SEO settings, with role-based access control via AccessControl and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented portfolio features (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Services, etc.) to their corresponding frontend files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend page file, covering public-facing pages (Blog) and all admin management pages (Dashboard, Projects, Blog, Testimonials, Skills, Services, Leads, SEO).
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, charts, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Boby Dhorajiya Portfolio', mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers, and includes a global ProfileSetup component.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin role before rendering children, showing appropriate loading, login, or access-denied states otherwise.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the Boby brand, social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X), quick navigation links, a contact CTA, and a copyright notice with a Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Page layout wrapper component that composes the Navigation header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a login/logout button that uses Internet Identity authentication, showing loading/authenticated states with appropriate icons and handling edge cases like already-authenticated errors.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with desktop and mobile layouts, scroll-based styling, active route highlighting, theme toggle, and login button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile (name and optional email) if no profile exists yet, using a form with save mutation.
frontend/src/components/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that fetches per-page SEO settings and updates the document title and meta description tag accordingly, falling back to provided defaults.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Simple button that toggles between dark and light themes using next-themes, displaying a Sun or Moon icon based on the current theme.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, and invalidates/refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, identity persistence, login/logout flow, and login status for ICP Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (projects, blogs, services, skills, testimonials, leads, SEO settings, and user profiles) via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes plus reusable component classes like glow effects, gradient text, and card hover styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying Boby Dhorajiya's profile, stats, bio, and core development values with animated layout sections and an SEO head component.
Admin page for managing blog posts with create, edit, and delete functionality, including a form with title, slug, SEO fields, and content, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying stats (projects, leads, blog posts) and navigation cards linking to all admin management sections, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsManagement: Admin page for viewing and deleting contact form lead submissions, displaying name, email, message, and timestamp for each lead, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectsManagem: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with create, edit, and delete support, including image file upload with progress tracking, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SeoManagement.t: Admin page for managing per-page SEO settings (meta title and description) with add, edit, and delete operations via a form with a page selector dropdown, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServicesManagem: Admin page for managing portfolio services, providing a form and list UI to add, edit, and delete service entries with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SkillsManagemen: Admin page for managing skills, allowing creation, editing, and deletion of skill entries with name and years-of-experience fields.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for managing client testimonials, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with author and message fields.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches posts via useGetBlogs hook and renders them as clickable cards with title, description, and date, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches a post by slug using useGetBlogBySlug and renders the title, metadata, and content with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that submits via useContactForm mutation, shows toast notifications on success/failure, and displays contact info alongside availability status.
frontend/src/pages/Experience.tsx: Experience page rendering a vertical timeline of work history entries with role details, highlights, and tech stacks for Boby Dhorajiya's freelance and contract positions.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for Boby Dhorajiya's portfolio featuring a hero section with CTAs, animated background, and a grid of four highlight cards covering mobile-first, security, cross-platform, and data protection.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: Simple 404 error page displaying a 'Page Not Found' message with a link back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects page that fetches projects from the backend via a query hook and falls back to three static placeholder projects, rendering each as a card with platform, tech, security, and role details.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page that displays seven static service offerings (Flutter, React Native, security, APIs, Firebase, etc.) or backend-fetched services if available, with loading state handling.
frontend/src/pages/Skills.tsx: Skills page showing four static skill categories (Flutter/Dart, React Native/JS, security, and additional tools) with proficiency progress bars, plus optional backend-fetched skills.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page that fetches client reviews from the backend and renders them as star-rated quote cards, with loading, error, and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an extended color palette using OKLCH variables (including cyan and navy scales), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for Boby Dhorajiya's portfolio website, including architecture notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for a React/Node.js/MySQL stack with an admin panel.
